languages.text: {n}Эоганн благодушно рассматривает хладную торговку.{/n} "Что ж, хваткий ум в сочетании с импульсивностью, быстротой нервных реакций и незамутненностью суждений — довольно редкий набор фенотипических признаков. Ее стремление к познанию... нетипичных технологий также является признаком незаурядного кругозора".

{n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн благодушно рассматривает хладную торговку.{/n} "Что ж, хваткий ум в сочетании с импульсивностью, быстротой нервных реакций и незамутненностью суждений — довольно редкий набор фенотипических признаков. Ее стремление к познанию... нетипичных технологий также является признаком незаурядного кругозора".

Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn mira con benevolencia a la Comerciante Fría.{/n} «Bueno, una mente perspicaz combinada e impulsiva, con reacciones neuronales rápidas y buen juicio es una combinación fenotípica nada común. Sus ansias de comprender las tecnologías... poco ortodoxas también apuntan a una perspectiva singular».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn mira con benevolencia a la Comerciante Fría.{/n} «Bueno, una mente perspicaz combinada e impulsiva, con reacciones neuronales rápidas y buen juicio es una combinación fenotípica nada común. Sus ansias de comprender las tecnologías... poco ortodoxas también apuntan a una perspectiva singular».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡和善地看着那位冷市商人。{/n}“嗯，敏捷的才智，冲动的性格，快速的神经反应，以及尚未受到污染的判断力，这样的表型组合其实相当罕见。她对于……非正统技术的求知欲，也进一步体现出其非同寻常的视角。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡和善地看着那位冷市商人。{/n}“嗯，敏捷的才智，冲动的性格，快速的神经反应，以及尚未受到污染的判断力，这样的表型组合其实相当罕见。她对于……非正统技术的求知欲，也进一步体现出其非同寻常的视角。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn bedenkt die Kalthändlerin mit einem wohlwollenden Blick.{/n} "Nun, ein beweglicher Intellekt gepaart mit Impulsivität, schnellen neuralen Reaktionen und klarem Urteilsvermögen ist eine vergleichsweise seltene Vereinigung phänotypischer Eigenschaften. Ihre Sehnsucht ... unorthodoxe Technologien zu verstehen, ist ein weiteres Indiz einer außergewöhnlichen Perspektive."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn bedenkt die Kalthändlerin mit einem wohlwollenden Blick.{/n} "Nun, ein beweglicher Intellekt gepaart mit Impulsivität, schnellen neuralen Reaktionen und klarem Urteilsvermögen ist eine vergleichsweise seltene Vereinigung phänotypischer Eigenschaften. Ihre Sehnsucht ... unorthodoxe Technologien zu verstehen, ist ein weiteres Indiz einer außergewöhnlichen Perspektive."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn observe l'adepte du Commerce Froid avec bienveillance.{/n} « Ma foi, un intellect agile associé à une certaine impulsivité, à des réactions neuronales rapides et à un jugement sain constitue une combinaison de caractéristiques phénotypiques particulièrement rare. Son désir de comprendre les... technologies hétérodoxes indique de surcroît une extraordinaire capacité de mise en perspective. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn observe l'adepte du Commerce Froid avec bienveillance.{/n} « Ma foi, un intellect agile associé à une certaine impulsivité, à des réactions neuronales rapides et à un jugement sain constitue une combinaison de caractéristiques phénotypiques particulièrement rare. Son désir de comprendre les... technologies hétérodoxes indique de surcroît une extraordinaire capacité de mise en perspective. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, şefkatle Soğuk Tacir'e bakıyor.{/n} "Şey... Dürtüsellik, hızlı sinirsel tepkiler ve bozulmamış yargı ile eşleşen çevik bir zekâ; fenotipik özelliklerin nadir görülen bir birleşimini meydana getirir. Ayrıca onun... Alışılmışın dışındaki teknolojileri anlama arzusu, olağanüstü bir bakış açısının göstergesidir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."

Dürtüsellik, hızlı sinirsel tepkiler ve bozulmamış yargı ile eşleşen çevik bir zekâ; fenotipik özelliklerin nadir görülen bir birleşimini meydana getirir. Ayrıca onun... Alışılmışın dışındaki teknolojileri anlama arzusu, olağanüstü bir bakış açısının göstergesidir."

languages.text: {n}エオグンは冷酷な商人を見つめ、慈悲深い眼差しを向ける。{/n}「なるほど、機敏な知性と衝動性、迅速な神経反応、そして純粋な判断力という、ある種の珍しい組み合わせの表現形の特徴を持つ。さらに、異端の技術の理解への渇望は、彼女の並外れた視点を示している。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gazes benevolently upon the Cold Trader.{/n} "Well, an agile intellect paired with impulsivity, rapid neural reactions, and untainted judgement constitutes a somewhat rare assembly of phenotypic characteristics. Her yearning toward the comprehension of... unorthodox technologies is furthermore indicative of an extraordinary perspective."
